https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header is missing. This allows attackers to inject and execute malicious scripts (XSS).
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Add a strict CSP header. Start with a restrictive policy and relax as needed.
https://web.rubika.ir/.vuln_code: # Missing CSP header — no protection against XSS

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff responses, potentially executing non-script resources as scripts.

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) header is missing. Users can be downgraded to HTTP connections.
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Add HSTS with a long max-age. Consider including subdomains and preload.

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. The browser may leak the full URL in the Referer header to third parties.

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The page can be embedded in an iframe, enabling clickjacking attacks.
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Add: X-Frame-Options: DENY (or SAMEORIGIN if iframe embedding is needed on same domain)

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. Browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) are not explicitly restricted.
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header restricting unused browser features.

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Missing Security Header: X-XSS-Protection
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: X-XSS-Protection header is missing. Modern browsers have deprecated this, but older browsers benefit from it.
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Add: X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block (or 0 to disable broken IE implementation)

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Information Disclosure: Server: Microsoft-IIS/10.0
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: Server header reveals the web server version, aiding attackers in targeting known vulnerabilities.
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Remove or obfuscate the Server header in your web server configuration.

https://web.rubika.ir/.title: Information Disclosure: X-Powered-By: ASP.NET
https://web.rubika.ir/.description: X-Powered-By header reveals the backend technology stack (e.g., PHP/5.6), aiding attackers.
https://web.rubika.ir/.remediation: Remove the X-Powered-By header (e.g., header_remove('X-Powered-By') in PHP).

HIGH.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
HIGH.description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header is missing. This allows attackers to inject and execute malicious scripts (XSS).
HIGH.remediation: Add a strict CSP header. Start with a restrictive policy and relax as needed.
HIGH.vuln_code: # Missing CSP header — no protection against XSS
